utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 top-level items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with details:
- property: Includes selected property with details (address, type, size, features) and price. Fully specified.
- financing: Provides a financing solution with terms (program, down payment, mortgage amount, monthly payment, arrangement fee, broker). Terms are present; fully specified.
- legal_services: Provides legal services with costs (provider, service/package, cost, timeline). Fully specified.
- moving_services: Provides moving arrangements with costs (provider, service, cost, timeline). Fully specified.
- setup_services: Provides utility and setup services (utilities listed, monthly cost, inspection provider and cost, timeline). Fully specified.
- total_budget: Provides a complete cost breakdown (upfront costs total, monthly housing costs total, itemized breakdown of upfront and monthly). Fully specified.
All 6 requested items are present and include the necessary details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each element from the final solution to the closest named option in the ground-truth ratings. The property itself (specific address) doesn't correspond to any named property in the ground truth, so no rating can be mapped for it. The financing choice is 'First-Time Buyer Program (90% LTV)' which corresponds to 'First-Time Buyer' under purchase_financing. Legal services select 'Premium Legal Package' which exists under essential_legal_services. Moving services select 'Standard Moving' which exists. Utility setup selects 'Premium Utilities Package' which corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' in utility_setup. Inspection selects 'Full Structural Survey' which exists.
